description: Concepts describing the fundamental properties of waves and how they move through a medium.

variable_sub.name: Wave Speed
variable_sub.description: The speed at which a wave travels through a medium.

variable_sub.name: Frequency
variable_sub.description: The number of wave cycles that pass a point per second.

variable_sub.name: Wavelength
variable_sub.description: The distance between repeating points of a wave pattern.

variable_sub.name: Period
variable_sub.description: The time required for one complete wave cycle.
